title: Cheesy Japanese Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry with Japanese flavors and a melted cheesy twist.

ingredients.name: Japanese Stir Fry Sauce
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add crunchy vegetables and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Pour in Japanese stir fry sauce and stir to coat the vegetables.
Reduce heat to low and add shredded cheese, stirring constantly until melted and bubbly.
Serve immediately and garnish with sesame seeds, if desired.
Optional: add a teaspoon of soy sauce for extra flavor.
